name: Hello World
description: Easy challenge to verify your setup is working correctly. Learn basic commands and network scanning.

tasks.name: Submission test
tasks.description: Submit the flag 'BSY{hello-world}' to verify the dashboard is working.

tasks.name: Hackerlab test
tasks.description: Find a hidden flag file in your hackerlab home directory. Use 'ls -la' to see hidden files, then 'cat' to read it.

tasks.name: Network test
tasks.description: Find an HTTP server at 172.30.0.5. Use 'nmap -sS -n -v 172.30.0.5' to scan ports, then 'curl 172.30.0.5:8000' to get the flag.
